name: Vasto
description: Steady and reliable, the Vasto revolver combines speed and power for a classic gunslinger feel.

Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.6
patchlogs.changes: Nova Prime, Mag Prime, Soma Prime, Boar Prime, Dakra Prime, and Vasto Prime Relics have been added to Plains of Eidolon Bounties, Orb Vallis Bounties, and in the Void drop table.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Vasto Prime damage returned to what it was previously in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes:
Vasto Prime Mastery Rank increased from 0 to 3.
Vasto Prime damage increased from 60 to 70.
Vasto Prime status chance increased from 15 to 20%.
Vasto Prime critical chance increased from 15 to 20%.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Vasto Day of the Dead skin not appearing as ‘Owned’ in the Market.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: The Burston, Opticor, Miter, Hind, Grinlok, Marelok, Twin Gremlins, Tiberon, Tetra, Buzlok, Attica, Vasto, Seer and Supra are now available for use in Conclave.  This list includes all weapon variants.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Soma Prime and Vasto Prime not being visible in the Codex.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.2 + 15.7.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Textures updated on the Pyra Prime Syandana and Vasto Prime now match Nova Prime’s metallic texture!

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.0 Nova Prime
patchlogs.fixes:
including Nova Prime, Soma Prime and Vasto Prime. Plus, stock up on discounted Platinum and get Exclusive Gear available only through Prime Access!
Add the deadly Soma and Vasto Primes to your Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed reload sounds for Dual Vastos with data mass reload animation.
